heading: Technical assistance
label: 10825 Technical assistance
text: The Secretary shall use not more than 2 percent of the amounts appropriated under to provide technical assistance to eligible systems with respect to activities carried out under this subchapter, consistent with requests by such systems for such assistance.section 10827 of this title
notes: Amendments1988— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “The Secretary shall provide technical assistance to eligible systems with respect to activities carried out under this subchapter.”Pub. L. 100–509
amendments: Amendments1988— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “The Secretary shall provide technical assistance to eligible systems with respect to activities carried out under this subchapter.”Pub. L. 100–509
